MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-26-2017 IN 206, DEFENDANT PATTY VILLEGGIANTE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE WAS HEARD. MARK HOOSHMAND, ESQ. OF HOOSHMAND LAW GROUP APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS & OPPOSING PARTIES. ANDREW WERNER, ESQ. OF CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT & MOVING PARTY. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/22/17 IS CONTINUED TO 06/26/17 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES.
